signals.headline: Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY odds favorite after 45-point statement game| YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY odds favorite after 45-point statement game| YES | HIGH confidence**  
Flagg passed Knueppel in DraftKings Sportsbook odds (-250 vs. +180) following his 45-point near triple-double in Sunday's win over the Lakers, part of a historic 96-point weekend that made him the first rookie since Allen Iverson to average 45+ points, 5+ rebounds, and 5+ assists over
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
